name: Blastermind
description: Blastermind is a purple alien-like Magic Trap Master who appeared in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Blastermind was once the "hide and sheep" champion of the Sardonic Mountains, where he and his friends played regularly. But when he was about to set a new Skylands record, the ground collapsed and Blastermind fell into a deep, mysterious cavern filled with shimmering crystals. As his friends circled the hole up top, they suddenly found themselves face to face with a dangerous Ham Dragon, who had felt the rumble of the collapse. Down below, Blastermind felt helpless. But fortunately, the cavern was filled with Psionic Power Crystals once used by the Ancients to amplify their thoughts. When the crystals "heard" Blastermind's worried thoughts about saving his friends, they found him worthy – and bestowed upon him awesome psionic powers, which he used to get out of the hole and mentally blast the circling Ham Dragon. Soon after, Blastermind joined the Skylanders as part of the Trap Team, using his new Traptanium Psionic Helmet to fight evil everywhere!
personality: Blastermind is very attuned to the feelings of others and tries hard to help his friends with their problems whenever he can.

story.content: Blastermind was once the "hide and sheep" champion of the Sardonic Mountains, where he and his friends played regularly. But when he was about to set a new Skylands record, the ground collapsed and Blastermind fell into a deep, mysterious cavern filled with shimmering crystals. As his friends circled the hole up top, they suddenly found themselves face to face with a dangerous Ham Dragon, who had felt the rumble of the collapse. Down below, Blastermind felt helpless. But fortunately, the cavern was filled with Psionic Power Crystals once used by the Ancients to amplify their thoughts. When the crystals "heard" Blastermind's worried thoughts about saving his friends, they found him worthy – and bestowed upon him awesome psionic powers, which he used to get out of the hole and mentally blast the circling Ham Dragon. Soon after, Blastermind joined the Skylanders as part of the Trap Team, using his new Traptanium Psionic Helmet to fight evil everywhere!

content: Ooh, don't mind if I do!
Smart and powerful, or what I call a win-win!
Ohh, an excellent new thinking cap!
This hat is mind blowing, I'm serious!
Best not to overthink my name.
Hm, I don't mind this name at all!

trivia: Blastermind and Head Rush are the only two Trap Masters with Traptanium attached to their headgears.
He and Short Cut are the shortest Trap Masters in height.

Blastermind shares many similarities with Kaos. Both have dark marking on their eyes. Both wear long coats. Both have four fingered hands, large arms and small legs. (However, Blastermind resembles more of an alien).
The Traptanium crystals on his helmet are the same shape as the base of Traps.
In-game, the Traptanium crystals on his head are crooked, but in artwork and figure, they are straight.

He doesn't get any money if you use Lock Puzzle Psychic on a Lock Puzzle. However, in Skylanders: SuperChargers, he can perform his Soul Gem ability on any Lock Puzzle, whether they are on treasure chests or doors.
When driving in SuperChargers, he steers telepathically.

He shares several similarities with the villain, Masker Mind: Both are purple creatures who float. Both have names which are plays on the term "mastermind". Both have quotes based on the phrase "Mind over matter". Both have abilities to temporarily control enemies.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Blastermind's Soul Gem Preview (Mind Over Matter)

gameplay: The Psionic Power Crystals had granted Blastermind incredible Psychic powers, such as levitating himself, as well as creating powerful blasts of brainwaves. He also has telekinesis to levitate and smash his foes against the ground, as well as shoot energy spheres that slow down his foes. His Soul Gem allows him to use his psychic powers to solve Lock Puzzles.

basic.name: Brainwaves
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to blast nearby enemies with powerful Brainwaves.

basic.name: Levitation
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to levitate enemies and smash them to the ground.

basic_upgrades.name: Tasty Waves
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to use the Brainwave attack for a longer duration.

basic_upgrades.name: Brain Freeze
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to create energy balls that slow enemies down.

basic_upgrades.name: Brain Storm
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge up the Brainwave attack, and release for a super-powered Brain Storm.

basic_upgrades.name: Down to Earth
basic_upgrades.content: Levitated enemies damage other nearby foes during the smashdown.

soulgems.name: Lock Puzzle Psychic
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge up Levitation attack and shoot Lock Puzzles with it to solve them instantly.

abilities.name: Brain Blowout
abilities.content: Press Attack 1 near levitating enemies for a massive knockout.

abilities.name: Remote Control
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge up the Levitation attack and control enemies you levitate.

abilities.name: Mind Mash
abilities.content: While levitating an enemy, press Attack 1, Attack 2, or Attack 3 to slam them down repeatedly.

abilities.name: Mind Control
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 to create an energy ball that takes control of enemies' minds.

abilities.name: The More The Merrier
abilities.content: Levitation Field passes through enemies and can levitate multiple foes.

abilities.name: Mind Blown
abilities.content: Mind-controlled enemies damage others after going back to normal.
